content.en:
Ancient Heavenly Palace.

The Arazu appeared.

Since the last awakening, he has not continued to sleep, but has been studying the fourth path, hoping to find inspiration from the fourth path, so that he can break through to the level of the ninth awakening of the Origin Ancestor on the other side.

However, it is too difficult to do this, and he naturally does not have much to gain in such a short period of time.

But today, he's out of the country.

"Ancestor, the reincarnation golden worm is about to appear!"

The Desolate Blood Ancestor stood respectfully in front of the Desolate Ancestor and said.

"Reincarnation Golden Worm, calculate the time, it's indeed about to appear!" "The Desolate Ancestor muttered, "Don't enter the ruins of reincarnation!"

"Yes!"

The Desolate Blood Ancestor naturally didn't dare to enter the ruins of reincarnation, and if he went in at this time, wouldn't he be looking for death.

However, the ancestor would go in every time.

But what chance the reincarnation golden worm has, he doesn't know, and the ancestor won't tell him.

This is also normal.

If there is really a great opportunity, if everyone knows about it, they will definitely venture into it, and then they will fall a lot of Origin Upper Realm Overlords.

So, everyone will hide it.

......

Time flies.

On this day, the reincarnation golden worm appeared in the ruins of reincarnation.

Ancient beings like the Desolate Ancestor, the overlords of the Origin Upper Realm who have completed the eight awakenings, have entered the ruins of reincarnation.

But.

The ruins of reincarnation are too big, and the chance of running into each other is very low.

Now.

Ye Tian sat in the ruins, waiting for the reincarnation golden worm to appear.

Buzz Buzz !!!

The void of the ruins of reincarnation is constantly shaking, and the void in the distance is twisting wildly, and all around it are distorted images, and these images are changing frame by frame.

Suddenly.

In one of the frames, a golden bug appears.

"Reincarnation Golden Worm!"

Ye Tian recognized it.

"It turns out that the reincarnation golden worm appeared like this!" Ye Tian muttered.

Although he saw it, he still didn't know where the reincarnation golden worm came from.

Swish!

This reincarnation golden worm came towards Ye Tian at an extremely fast speed.

Ye Tian held a high-grade supreme treasure spear on the other side and fought against it.

He doesn't know how to take the treasure of reincarnation, and he is afraid that the treasure of reincarnation will be lost in the ruins of reincarnation!

Therefore, his reincarnation arcanaphic spear is still on the replica body of the land on the other side of eternity.

Thundered!!!!

Ye Tian and the reincarnation golden worm fought together.

The strength of this reincarnation golden worm is not too strong, and it is only comparable to the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm who has awakened four times.

Soon.

Ye Tian killed this reincarnation golden worm.

After killing this reincarnation gold insect, Ye Tian dissected this reincarnation gold insect and found a golden stone inside its body, which contained the origin of the reincarnation gold insect.

He crushed the stone and absorbed the origin of the reincarnation gold worm to try the effect.

The reason why he did this was also because he instinctively felt the attraction of his body and wanted to absorb the origin of the reincarnation golden worm.

Rumble!!!

His body quickly absorbed the origin of the reincarnation golden worm, and his physical strength increased a little, and the origin of the other side increased a little, but as for the will of the origin realm, it did not improve anything.

However, it can be seen from this that the Reincarnation Golden Worm Origin has a very terrifying effect on the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm, and the absorption speed is fast!

Like other resources, the absorption speed is too slow, and it takes a long time to refine it and improve its cultivation a little, and the effect of the reincarnation golden worm origin is too good.

"Do the Origin Upper Realm Overlords of the Land of Eternity know the value of the Reincarnation Golden Worm?"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Most of the Origin Upper Realm Overlords should not know, I am afraid that only a few Origin Upper Realm Overlords know, but they do not dare to enter the ruins of reincarnation during this period, otherwise their lives will be lost.

After all, there will be too many reincarnation golden bugs during this period, who is sure to save their lives?

Buzz Buzz!!

The surrounding picture was distorted, and another reincarnation gold worm appeared.

One!

Two!

Three!

Ye Tian felt that there might be a connection between these reincarnation gold worms, and when he killed a reincarnation gold worm, more reincarnation gold worms appeared.

The strength of these reincarnation golden insects is not weak at all, but they are still not his opponents.

Thereupon.

He went all out and killed these reincarnation gold worms in a short period of time.

Then, he took the origin stone of the reincarnation gold worm and quickly left.

However, he was still discovered.

Airplanes!!!!!

Under the distortion of the surrounding pictures, one by one reincarnation golden worms appeared, and this time a very powerful reincarnation golden worm appeared.

The aura of this reincarnation golden worm was extremely terrifying, and it had definitely reached the Origin Upper Realm Overlord comparable to the six awakenings.

Unless he holds the reincarnation treasure in his hand, Ye Tiancai has the hope of fighting with this reincarnation golden worm, but it is impossible to beat the other party now.

Moreover, in addition to this reincarnation golden worm, there are also several Origin Upper Realm Overlords whose strength is comparable to that of the Five Awakenings.

The number of reincarnation gold worms that appeared this time reached dozens, and this terrifying number shocked Ye Tian.

"There are only a few Origin Upper Realm Overlords in the entire Eternal Beyond Land, but there are so many reincarnation golden worms here, and this is probably just the tip of the iceberg!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

Soon.

The number of reincarnation gold bugs has increased again.

Burst!

Ye Tian didn't dodge, and was shattered by the most powerful reincarnation golden worm that smashed an arm, while the light released by the other reincarnation golden worms pierced his body.

This time, he was badly injured.

After a while, he had no combat strength, and his entire body was directly shattered.

This replica body has fallen!

And after the fall of this replica body, those reincarnation gold worms left one after another.

Soon after.

Ye Tian's other replica body shuttled here from the land of eternity, and took away a few pieces of the origin stone of the reincarnation gold worm, the other reincarnation gold worms were not interested in these few origin stones, it was estimated that they were the same kind of items, they didn't like to devour it.

Therefore, it was still taken away by Ye Tian.

However, the probability of this replica being found is still very high.

So, he was going to quickly copy a reincarnation gold worm copy body, and then walk in the ruins of reincarnation as a reincarnation gold worm copy body, so that it would be safe.

After all, at present, the reincarnation gold worms will not fight each other.

Soon.

A reincarnation golden worm copied the body.

At the moment when it was copied, Ye Tian's reincarnation golden worm copied his body and sensed other reincarnation golden insects, and the consciousness of all reincarnation golden insects seemed to have entered a picture, and they could sense each other, even communicate simply.

Moreover, he also sensed the distress of other reincarnation gold worms, knew the coordinates of the other party, and could go through the screen to support.
